intro.label: Why Havenkvist Tech
intro.title: Technical craft meets business understanding
intro.body: I combine modern web technology with a clear understanding of what actually drives your business forward. No unnecessary complexity — just solutions that work, load fast, and are easy to maintain.

meta.title: About – Freelance Web Developer in Haslev
meta.description: Meet Lucas, fullstack developer and the person behind Havenkvist Tech. Based in Haslev, Denmark, building modern, fast websites for businesses across Zealand.

hero.label: About
hero.title: Code by day, code by night
hero.subtitle: The developer behind Havenkvist Tech — and why this studio exists.

story.label: My background
story.title: A fullstack developer with a nighttime obsession for the frontend
paragraphs: I'm Lucas, a fullstack developer based in Haslev, Denmark. By day, I build and maintain production applications with Elixir and Phoenix LiveView — systems that need to stay fast, reliable, and easy to reason about at scale.

Havenkvist Tech is my evening and weekend project — a small freelance studio where I explore the other side of the stack. Here, I mainly work with React, TypeScript, and Next.js, building modern websites and web applications for clients who want a fast, polished online presence.

Splitting my time between two ecosystems keeps me sharp. The discipline and simplicity I value in Elixir shapes how I write React — predictable state, clear data flow, and code that won't surprise you six months from now.
When I'm not at my day job or working on client projects, you'll usually find me refining this very site, reading up on web performance, or experimenting with the newest Next.js features.

points.title: Reliability
points.body: Production experience from my day job means I take uptime, testing, and maintainability seriously — even for small projects.

points.title: Clear communication
points.body: You'll always know where your project stands. No jargon, no radio silence — just honest, direct updates.

points.title: Modern craft
points.body: Every project is built with the same modern stack I use to explore new ideas: React, TypeScript, and Next.js.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.body: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hi? Reach out directly — I read and answer every message myself.

cta.title: Ready to start a project?
cta.body: Let's talk about what you're building and how I can help bring it to life.

meta.title: Services & Pricing – Websites for Tradespeople & Local Businesses
meta.description: Web development, maintenance, and performance optimization for small businesses, with transparent pricing starting at $1,395 and no hidden fees. Based in Haslev, Denmark.

hero.label: Services & Pricing
hero.title: What I build, and what it costs
hero.subtitle: From new websites to ongoing maintenance and performance work — see what's included and what it costs, with no hidden fees.

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.description: Perfect for entrepreneurs and small businesses that need a professional online presence.
tiers.details: A clean, professional website with up to 5 pages — perfect for a homepage, services, about, and contact. It works well on phones and tablets, shows up properly in Google searches, and includes a working contact form so customers can reach you. For the first month after launch, I'll fix anything that comes up at no extra cost.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: For businesses that need custom functionality and better performance.
tiers.details: A larger, fully custom-designed website with up to 12 pages, built specifically around your business rather than a template. You'll get a simple admin panel (a "CMS") so you can update text and photos yourself without knowing how to code. I'll also fine-tune the site so it loads fast and ranks well in search engines, and set it up in both Danish and English if you serve customers in both languages. Includes 3 months of support after launch.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: For complex projects, web applications, and businesses with specific requirements.
tiers.details: For businesses that need more than a website — think booking systems, customer portals, or tools connected to other software you already use, like accounting or inventory. There's no limit on pages, and I'll connect the site to whatever other systems your business relies on. Performance and security are tailored specifically to your setup, and you get an ongoing maintenance agreement with priority support, so problems get solved fast.

pricing.note: All prices are excluding VAT. Hosting and domain are not included in the packages below — I'll help you set them up, or you can add the Maintenance & Support plan (see "What I offer" below) to have me handle it all for you, ongoing.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: A typical Basic project takes 2-3 weeks, while Professional and Enterprise projects usually take 4-8 weeks depending on scope.

items.question: Can I edit the content myself afterward?
items.answer: Yes. For Professional and Enterprise packages, I integrate a CMS so you can update text and images yourself without coding.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, projects are typically invoiced in two installments: 50% at kickoff and 50% at launch. Get in touch to arrange details.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Tell me about your project and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with next steps.
